report.title: 90-Day Execution Pack: Governance Data, Dashboards, and Executive Reporting
report.abstract: This report provides the executive execution pack for a 90-day AI governance rollout. It includes the phased implementation plan, Gantt chart specifications, a comparative analysis of Power BI vs. Tableau for G-SIFI reporting, and a technical deep-dive into the Power BI semantic model, DAX measures, and SQL validation suite required for board-level transparency.
report.content:
# 1. 90-Day AI Governance Implementation Plan
## 1.1 Implementation Phases & Gantt Milestones The rollout follows a high-velocity 3-phase execution model:
### Phase 1: Foundation & Ingestion (Days 1–30) - **M1**: Model Inventory & Capability Classification (Tier 1 vs Tier 2). - **M2**: Deployment of Sentinel AI Governance Platform v2.4 (Monitor Mode). - **M3**: Ratification of the International Compute Governance Consortium (ICGC) Internal Charter. - **M4**: Initial 30-day "Compliance Baseline" report for the Board.
### Phase 2: Integration & Identity (Days 31–60) - **M5**: EAIP Nervous System onboarding. mTLS & SPIFFE ID assignment to top 50 agents. - **M6**: RAG Provenance hardening. Deployment of zero-trust context middleware. - **M7**: OPA-Rego policy drafting for EU AI Act Annex IV automation. - **M8**: C-Suite Dashboard Alpha release.
### Phase 3: Resilience & Scaling (Days 61–90) - **M9**: Execution of AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 War-Game scenario. - **M10**: Activation of SEV-0 Hardware Kill-Switches. - **M11**: Full CI/CD integration of automated conformity assessments. - **M12**: Board Presentation & Permanent Operating Model Handover.
---
# 2. Executive Dashboard & Platform Strategy
## 2.1 Platform Choice: Power BI vs. Tableau **Definitive Recommendation: Power BI.** - **Rationale**: Superior integration with the Microsoft/Azure ecosystem (common in G-SIFIs), better Row-Level Security (RLS) for federated identity, and the ability to leverage **DAX** for complex compliance risk modeling directly against the Sentinel telemetry stream.
## 2.2 Power BI Semantic Model & DAX Measures The semantic model is anchored on a Star Schema with `GovernancePulse` as the central Fact table.
### Key DAX Measures: - **Alignment Score**: `AlignmentScore = DIVIDE(COUNTROWS(FILTER(Pulse, Pulse[SafetyStatus] = "Permit")), COUNTROWS(Pulse))` - **Compliance Delta (MoM)**: `ComplianceDelta = [AlignmentScore] - CALCULATE([AlignmentScore], DATEADD('Date'[Date], -1, MONTH))` - **Net Value Capture (NVC)**: `NVC = [GrossBusinessGain] - [RiskMitigationCost] - [ProjectedBlastRadius]`
## 2.3 SQL/DAX Validation Suite To ensure regulator-defensibility, the dashboard data must be validated against the WORM logs: ```sql -- SQL Validation: Verify Telemetry Stream vs. Fact Table SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sentinel_telemetry_stream WHERE event_time BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-03-31' EXCEPT SELECT COUNT(*) FROM powerbi_fact_governance_pulse; ```
---
# 3. Board Slide Specification (Slide 1–10) 1. **The State of the Union**: AGI capability vs. Alignment Delta. 2. **Financial Exposure**: Model Risk Management (MRM) heatmap. 3. **Regulatory Surface**: EU AI Act Article 11/14 readiness scores. 4. **Agentic Swarm Health**: Interoperability (EAIP) metrics. 5. **The SEV-0 Playbook**: Hardware-kill assurance. 6. **Case Study**: AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 lessons learned. 7. **Resource Allocation**: Net Value Capture (NVC) analysis. 8. **Compliance Remediation**: Ticket velocity (Jira/ServiceNow). 9. **Forward Guidance**: Scaling to ASI-readiness (2027–2030). 10. **The Call to Action**: Final approval of the Homeostatic Operating Model.
